title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discuss their adoption of AI coding tools at scale, covering workflow changes, productivity measurement, and organizational impact. Key insights include inversion of SDLC effort distribution, small teams delivering accelerated roadmaps, and shifts in how engineers spend their time.
